title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Zensar Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Zensar Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Zensar Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Jabalpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Zensar Technologies:
Zensar Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zensar Technologies!
